data.name: Home_Subtitle
data.value: Discover the best virtual reality arcades and gaming centers in your area

data.name: Home_NoArcadesFound
data.value: No arcades found matching your criteria

data.name: Home_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Discover amazing VR arcades near you. Experience the latest virtual reality games, read reviews, and find the perfect spot for your next immersive gaming session.

data.name: Home_NoArcadesMessage
data.value: Try adjusting your filters or clear all filters to see all arcades.

data.name: Home_LatestTechnologyDesc
data.value: Experience cutting-edge VR headsets and equipment without the high cost of purchasing your own. Try the latest games and hardware before you buy.

data.name: Home_SocialExperienceDesc
data.value: Meet fellow VR enthusiasts, enjoy multiplayer experiences, or bring your friends for a unique social gaming adventure.

data.name: Home_ExpertGuidanceDesc
data.value: Staff at VR arcades can help you with equipment setup, recommend games based on your preferences, and ensure you have the best experience.

data.name: Home_HowToFind
data.value: How to Find Your Perfect VR Arcade

data.name: Review_NoReviews
data.value: No reviews yet. Be the first to review!

data.name: Blog_Subtitle
data.value: News, tips, and guides about VR gaming

data.name: Pricing_Subtitle
data.value: Choose the perfect plan for your VR arcade

data.name: Footer_Description
data.value: VR Arcade Finder helps you discover the best virtual reality gaming centers worldwide.

data.name: Meta_SiteDescription
data.value: Find the best VR arcades and virtual reality gaming centers near you. Browse reviews, compare prices, and discover amazing VR experiences.

data.name: Meta_Keywords
data.value: VR arcade, virtual reality, VR gaming, VR center, VR experience, gaming arcade

data.name: Profile_EmailNotifications
data.value: Email me about new arcades in my area

data.name: Profile_EventNotifications
data.value: Email me about upcoming VR events

data.name: Favorites_NoFavoritesMessage
data.value: Start exploring VR arcades and save your favorites!

data.name: Favorites_ConfirmRemove
data.value: Remove this arcade from your favorites?

data.name: MyReviews_NoReviewsMessage
data.value: Visit a VR arcade and share your experience!

data.name: MyReviews_ConfirmDelete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this review?

data.name: AccessDenied_Message
data.value: You don't have permission to access this page.

data.name: AccessDenied_ContactAdmin
data.value: If you believe this is an error, please contact the administrator or try logging in with a different account.

data.name: NotFound_Message
data.value: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

data.name: Map_SearchForArcades
data.value: Search for VR arcades in your area

data.name: Map_UnableToGetLocation
data.value: Unable to get your location. Please enter a city manually.

data.name: Arcade_MoreVisibility
data.value: Claim your listing and get more visibility!

data.name: Blog_NoBlogPosts
data.value: No blog posts yet. Check back soon!

data.name: Pricing_GetMoreVisibility
data.value: Get more visibility for your VR arcade

data.name: Pricing_AnnualDiscount
data.value: Save up to 20% with annual billing! Contact us for enterprise plans.

data.name: Blog_NewsletterDesc
data.value: Get the latest VR news and tips delivered to your inbox.

data.name: About_Subtitle
data.value: Your gateway to immersive virtual reality experiences

data.name: About_MissionText1
data.value: VR Arcade Finder is dedicated to connecting VR enthusiasts with the best virtual reality arcades around the world. We believe that everyone should have access to premium VR experiences, whether you're a first-time user curious about virtual reality or a seasoned gamer looking for the latest experiences.

data.name: About_MissionText2
data.value: Our platform makes it easy to discover, compare, and choose VR arcades based on location, available games, equipment, and user reviews.

data.name: About_LocationSearchDesc
data.value: Find VR arcades near you with our powerful search and map features.

data.name: About_GameCatalogDesc
data.value: Browse thousands of VR games and find arcades that have them.

data.name: About_UserReviewsDesc
data.value: Read honest reviews from real VR arcade visitors.

data.name: About_EventsTournamentsDesc
data.value: Discover VR gaming events and competitions near you.

data.name: About_ArcadeOwnersText
data.value: Are you a VR arcade owner? Join our platform to increase your visibility and reach thousands of potential customers actively searching for VR experiences.

data.name: About_ArcadeFeature1
data.value: Create a detailed listing with photos and game inventory

data.name: About_ArcadeFeature2
data.value: Respond to customer reviews and build your reputation

data.name: About_ArcadeFeature4
data.value: Access analytics to understand your audience

data.name: About_ArcadeFeature5
data.value: Featured placement options for maximum exposure

data.name: About_ContactText
data.value: Have questions, feedback, or partnership inquiries? We'd love to hear from you!

data.name: Privacy_Section1_Text
data.value: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you:

data.name: Privacy_Section1_Item2
data.value: Submit or claim a VR arcade listing

data.name: Privacy_Section2_Text
data.value: When you use our services, we automatically collect certain information, including:

data.name: Privacy_Section2_Item1
data.value: Log information (IP address, browser type, access times)

data.name: Privacy_Section3_Text
data.value: We use the information we collect to:

data.name: Privacy_Section3_Item1
data.value: Provide, maintain, and improve our services

data.name: Privacy_Section3_Item2
data.value: Process transactions and send related information

data.name: Privacy_Section3_Item4
data.value: Monitor and analyze trends and usage

data.name: Privacy_Section4_Text
data.value: We do not sell your personal information. We may share information:

data.name: Privacy_Section4_Item2
data.value: With service providers who assist in our operations

data.name: Privacy_Section4_Item4
data.value: In connection with a merger or acquisition

data.name: Privacy_Section5_Text
data.value: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

data.name: Privacy_Section6_Text
data.value: Depending on your location, you may have rights regarding your personal information, including:

data.name: Privacy_Section7_Text
data.value: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to collect information about your browsing activities. You can control cookies through your browser settings.

data.name: Privacy_Section8_Text
data.value: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page.

data.name: Privacy_Section9_Text
data.value: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at:

data.name: Terms_Section1_Text
data.value: By accessing or using VR Arcade Finder, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

data.name: Terms_Section2_Text
data.value: VR Arcade Finder provides an online platform that connects users with VR arcades. We offer:

data.name: Terms_Section2_Item3
data.value: Business listing services for arcade owners

data.name: Terms_Section3_Text
data.value: To access certain features, you must create an account. You are responsible for:

data.name: Terms_Section3_Item1
data.value: Maintaining the confidentiality of your account

data.name: Terms_Section3_Item2
data.value: All activities that occur under your account

data.name: Terms_Section3_Item3
data.value: Notifying us of any unauthorized use

data.name: Terms_Section4_Text1
data.value: You retain ownership of content you submit. By posting content, you grant us a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, display, and distribute your content on our platform.

data.name: Terms_Section4_Text2
data.value: You agree not to post content that:

data.name: Terms_Section5_Text
data.value: Arcade owners who list their businesses agree to:

data.name: Terms_Section5_Item2
data.value: Keep their listing information up to date

data.name: Terms_Section5_Item4
data.value: Comply with all applicable laws and regulations

data.name: Terms_Section6_Text
data.value: Premium listings require payment. Subscription fees are billed in advance and are non-refundable except as required by law or as specified in our refund policy.

data.name: Terms_Section7_Text
data.value: All content, trademarks, and other intellectual property on VR Arcade Finder are owned by us or our licensors. You may not copy, modify, or distribute our content without permission.

data.name: Terms_Section8_Text
data.value: Our services are provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee the accuracy of listings or reviews.

data.name: Terms_Section9_Text
data.value: To the maximum extent permitted by law, VR Arcade Finder shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of our services.

data.name: Terms_Section10_Text
data.value: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless VR Arcade Finder from any claims, damages, or expenses arising from your use of our services or violation of these terms.

data.name: Terms_Section11_Text
data.value: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account for violations of these terms or for any other reason at our discretion.

data.name: Terms_Section12_Text
data.value: We may modify these terms at any time. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

data.name: Terms_Section13_Text
data.value: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with applicable laws.

data.name: Terms_Section14_Text
data.value: For questions about these terms, please contact us at:

data.name: Games_Subtitle
data.value: Browse our catalog of VR games available at arcades

data.name: Games_NoGamesMessage
data.value: Try adjusting your filters or search terms.

data.name: Claim_Benefit3
data.value: Add photos and VR game inventory

data.name: Claim_EmailNote
data.value: We'll send verification to this email

data.name: Claim_EmailVerification
data.value: Email verification (we'll send a code to your business email)

data.name: Claim_PhoneVerification
data.value: Phone verification (we'll call the listed business number)

data.name: Claim_DocumentVerification
data.value: Document verification (upload business license or utility bill)

data.name: Claim_AcceptedDocuments
data.value: Accepted: Business license, utility bill, or official document showing business name and address

data.name: Claim_NotesPlaceholder
data.value: Any additional information that helps verify your ownership...

data.name: Claim_ConfirmAuthorized
data.value: I confirm that I am authorized to represent this business and agree to the

data.name: Claim_Next1
data.value: We'll review your claim request within 1-2 business days

data.name: Claim_Next2
data.value: You'll receive a verification email or phone call

data.name: Claim_Next3
data.value: Once verified, you'll have full access to manage your listing

data.name: Claim_Next4
data.value: You can upgrade to a premium plan for additional features

data.name: Submit_Subtitle
data.value: Add your VR arcade to our directory and reach thousands of VR enthusiasts

data.name: Submit_DescriptionPlaceholder
data.value: Describe your VR arcade, what makes it unique, and what customers can expect...

data.name: Submit_GalleryNote
data.value: Select multiple photos of your arcade, VR equipment, and setup

data.name: Checkout_ThankYou
data.value: Thank you for your purchase. Your listing has been activated.

data.name: Checkout_Next1
data.value: Your listing is now live and visible to users

data.name: Checkout_Next2
data.value: You can manage your listing from your

data.name: Checkout_Next3
data.value: A confirmation email has been sent to your email address

data.name: Checkout_Next4
data.value: Access your analytics to track views and engagement

data.name: Blog_ExploreCitiesInCountry
data.value: Explore {0} cities with VR arcades in {1}

data.name: Blog_ExploreCities
data.value: Explore {0} cities with VR arcades around the world

data.name: Blog_DiscoverArcades
data.value: Discover {0} VR arcades in {1} with {2}+ games available

data.name: Blog_NoCitiesMessage
data.value: We couldn't find any cities with VR arcades matching your criteria.

data.name: Blog_FindArcadesDesc
data.value: Use our interactive map to discover VR arcades in your area

data.name: Blog_PostMetaDescription
data.value: Discover {0} VR arcades in {1}, {2}. Find the best places to experience virtual reality with {3}+ games available. Reviews, ratings & directions.

data.name: Blog_PostHeroSubtitle
data.value: Your complete guide to {0} VR arcades in {1}, {2}

data.name: Blog_PostIntro
data.value: {0} is home to {1} VR arcades{2}. Whether you're looking for a casual VR gaming session or an immersive multiplayer experience, you'll find great options here.

data.name: Blog_WithGamesLibrary
data.value: , offering a combined library of over {0} games for visitors to enjoy

data.name: Blog_GamesAppearMost
data.value: These games appear most frequently across arcades in {0}:

data.name: Blog_Tip1Desc
data.value: Popular VR arcades can fill up quickly, especially on weekends.

data.name: Blog_Tip2Desc
data.value: Staff can suggest the perfect VR experience based on your preferences.

data.name: Blog_Tip3Desc
data.value: Most VR sessions are 30-60 minutes. Give yourself time to try multiple games.

data.name: Blog_Tip4Desc
data.value: Step outside your comfort zone and try a VR experience you've never had before!

data.name: Blog_FindArcadesIn
data.value: Find all VR arcades in {0} on our map

data.name: Blog_SeeAllOnMap
data.value: See all arcades in {0} on our interactive map.
